name: run-tests
description: Auto-detect project type and run tests, optionally showing only failures with --brief.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Test file or directory to run

parameters.name: --brief
parameters.description: Show only failures/errors/summary, omit all PASS lines

examples.expected: Runs tests and shows only failure/error lines

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces repeated cd+go test/pytest commands with a single auto-detecting call, and --brief shrinks observation by omitting all PASS lines.
